# ID-18: Author skill-routing-map.md reference doc (Orchestrator skill-routing per WP5 Option C)

Per kh-prod-readiness-S52 WP5 meta-skill evaluation (`docs/plans/phase-0-investigation/meta-skill-evaluation.md`), Option C ratified: author a `docs/reference/skill-routing-map.md` reference doc that lists `Task tilt → recommended skill set` so the Orchestrator (or Liam) can look up which task-specific skills to name in each dispatch brief. Closes the Liam-S51-close question about an Orchestrator meta-skill. Single-Subtask Task — the doc IS the spec; no PRODUCT/TECH chain needed.

## Acceptance criteria

- `docs/reference/skill-routing-map.md` exists with columns: Task tilt | Required skills | Conditional skills | Anti-patterns | Example Tasks.
- 8–10 tilt rows covering: AI, CI, Supabase, Frontend (React), Frontend (Astro), Data-pipeline, Testing (Playwright), Documentation, Security/RLS, Workflow tooling.
- `workflow-orchestration` SKILL.md §4.4 updated: replace 5-tilt example list with map pointer; preserve user-driven framing.
- `task-planner.md` §4.1 (RESEARCH workflow) references the map.
- CLAUDE.md "Key Reference Documents" table gains a row.
- Freshness-coupling registration added so the map updates when skills are added / deleted.
- Map references the meta-skill-evaluation.md Q-META-1/2/3 ratification answers (Liam at session close).

## Dependencies

None — fully self-contained. Slate for a doc-light session.

## Subtasks

### ID-18.1: Author skill-routing-map.md + integrate references

- **Status:** done
- **Dependencies:** _none_
- **Updated:** _unset_

Single implementation Subtask: write the map, wire its references into workflow-orchestration SKILL.md §4.4 + task-planner.md §4.1 + CLAUDE.md key-reference-docs table + freshness-coupling registration.

**Test strategy:** Map file exists at expected path; 8–10 tilt rows present; cross-references from workflow-orchestration + task-planner + CLAUDE.md all resolve; freshness-coupling guard test passes after registration.

**Details:**

Worktree first action: `cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && git reset --hard production-readiness`.

Author `docs/reference/skill-routing-map.md` (~150 lines) per the spec embedded in `docs/plans/phase-0-investigation/meta-skill-evaluation.md` §4. Reference Liam's Q-META-1/2/3 ratification at S52 session close for the granularity / cadence / anti-patterns decisions.

Update:
- `.claude/skills/workflow-orchestration/SKILL.md` §4.4 — replace the 5-tilt example list (`AI-tilted → claude-api`, etc.) with a one-line pointer to the new map. Preserve the user-driven framing.
- `.claude/agents/task-planner.md` §4.1 — point RESEARCH workflow at the map for task-specific skill selection.
- `CLAUDE.md` Key Reference Documents table — add a row for the new doc.
- Freshness-coupling registration (the existing `docs/reference/` reference-doc freshness pattern — check `lib/reference-docs/` or equivalent for the registration mechanism).

Commit via `commit-commands` skill. Move status pending → in_progress at start; do NOT set done (per §6.3 + B12).
